---
title: "Welcome!!!"
description: |
  
site: distill::distill_website
---

```{r setup, echo=FALSE, fig.align='right', fig.width=4, fig.height=4}
knitr::include_graphics(path="C:/Disk D/orkhansari/pofile.png")


```

## About me

Welcome to my website! I am a senior agricultural economist and quantitative researcher with 9+ years of experience delivering quantitative research, statistical analysis, and evidence-based consulting across international development, agricultural economics, and socio-economic projects. I specialize in transforming complex data into meaningful insights by combining econometric analysis, impact evaluation, causal inference, and rigorous research methodologies to support informed decision-making. Experienced in leading the full research and analytics lifecycle from study design and survey methodology to data collection, statistical modelling, stakeholder reporting, and scientific communication using Stata and R, while continuously expanding my expertise in AI-powered analytics and Python. Passionate about leveraging data, emerging AI technologies, and analytical innovation to solve complex challenges, generate actionable recommendations, and create measurable impact for governments, international organizations, and research institutions.
